title: README operator quickstart for staged Phase 3 --staged-spine
problem: ticket-162 and ticket-163 prove fixture-mode staged discover→report orchestration and idempotency in tests. Operators lack README documentation for running the staged Phase 3 spine via research run --fixture-mode --staged-spine.
acceptance_criteria: README Operator Quickstart documents staged Phase 3 fixture-mode run with --staged-spine, temp --db, and network env prerequisites.
No live LLM required for documented mock path.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
non_goals: Live OpenAlex network in default tests.
rollback_plan: Revert README section; retain ticket-162/163 orchestrator and tests.
